summary: Full end-to-end testing of Quill Phase 1 (two-screen SPA + hardcoded /api/generate). 13/13 backend pytest cases pass and the full UI flow (input → result → print/export → new) works correctly for all 4 modes. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses `await db.status_checks.find(...)` in /api/status — fine for Phase 1 but unrelated to Quill brief; could be removed for tidiness.
Random latency uses `random.uniform(0.6, 0.9)` which is correct; consider documenting the artificial delay in OpenAPI description for future maintainers.
seed_data_creation: None required; backend serves hardcoded QUILL_SEEDS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_quill_api.py and validate: /api/openapi.json reachable, all 4 modes return correct seed JSON (titles, exportLabel, sections/suggestions/flags shapes), clinical flags contain risk keywords while non-clinical don't, empty/whitespace transcript → 400, invalid mode → 422, latency between ~0.55s and 3s. UI verified at desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844): TopBar wordmark + tagline (tagline hidden on mobile via sm:inline), Mode dropdown defaults to Clinical with all 4 options correctly labeled, textarea placeholder exact match, Generate disabled when empty/whitespace, Load sample fills correct verbatim transcript per mode, Generate shows 'Generating…' loading state, ResultScreen split-view with transcript-panel (muted) + record-panel, gap-check-card has red accent (#DC2626 = rgb(220,38,38)) for clinical and amber (#F59E0B = rgb(245,158,11)) for sales/interview/intake, Export disabled until Approve, labels match exportLabel from JSON ('Print prescription'/'Copy follow-up email'/'Export scorecard'/'Export brief'), clinical export opens PrintView with Clinic Name, Patient name, Drug/Dose/Frequency/Instructions table headers, 3 medication rows, clinician signature line, Quill footer; window.print() is invoked (stubbed in test). Non-clinical export copies composed body to clipboard (verified clipboard contains documentTitle + 'Suggestions') and shows 'Copied' toast. New button resets transcript and mode to Clinical. Mobile (390px) stacks transcript above record panel.
